notes: Day 20 (Mar 19) UPDATE 4:15AM ET. Sources: CNN live, AJ D19-20, CNBC, Bloomberg, Fortune, CBS, NPR, C-SPAN, Wikipedia, Investing.com, IAEA, Rosatom, USNI, The National, Windward, Al Jazeera Hormuz.

JOHNSON: OBJECTIVES 'BEEN MET': House Speaker declared war 'virtually accomplished.' Pentagon simultaneously requested $200B+ supplemental. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets struck, 120+ vessels destroyed. US dropped 5,000-lb bunker busters on Iranian missile sites along Hormuz coastline. Dem Lieu: US 'running short of missiles.' Johnson hints reconciliation bill for war funding.

ISFAHAN UNDERGROUND FACILITY: IAEA reveals Iran has NEW underground enrichment facility at Isfahan. Grossi: 'many questions' — inspectors unable to visit since June 2025 12-day war strikes. Iran stored most highly enriched uranium (440kg at 60%) in underground tunnel complex. Enough for 9 weapons if enriched to 90%. IAEA has NO access to any of Iran's 4 declared enrichment sites.

HORMUZ TRAFFIC SLIGHTLY INCREASING: Vessels nearly doubled in recent days. Ships rerouting through Iranian territorial waters — 'permission-based transits to friendly countries.' 11 China-linked vessels since Mar 1 (Lloyd's). Shadow fleet = half of all transits. Bessent: US 'letting' Iranian tankers through. Iraq resumed 250K bbl/day via Ceyhan/Turkey.

OIL VOLATILE: Brent opened $103.71 (down from $107.38 close), trading range $100-112. WTI $96.40. Markets digesting Johnson 'objectives met' vs. continued escalation. EIA forecast: Brent >$95 next 2 months, <$80 by Q3 if war ends.
200+ UKRAINIAN EXPERTS: Zelenskyy confirmed 200+ Ukrainian anti-drone military experts deployed to several ME countries to help defend against Iranian-designed drones.

MACRON MORATORIUM: French President called for 'moratorium on strikes targeting civilian infrastructure, particularly energy and water supply facilities.' Pentagon: 5,000-lb GBU-57 deep penetrators on Hormuz missile sites = escalating bunker-busting campaign.

theoryBox: Day 20 — 'OBJECTIVES MET' vs REALITY: Johnson declared war 'virtually accomplished' while Pentagon requested $200B+. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets, 120+ vessels. IAEA reveals NEW underground Isfahan enrichment facility — inspectors locked out. 440kg enriched uranium location unknown. Hormuz traffic slightly increasing (permission-based). Iraq resumed 250K bbl/day via Turkey. Brent volatile $100-112. 200+ Ukrainian anti-drone experts deployed. Dem Lieu: US 'running short of missiles.' War's political narrative diverging sharply from operational reality.
theoryBox_fa: روز ۲۰ — 'اهداف محقق شده' در برابر واقعیت: جانسون: جنگ تقریباً تمام. پنتاگون ۲۰۰+ میلیارد. IAEA: تأسیسات زیرزمینی جدید اصفهان — ۴۴۰ کیلو اورانیوم نامعلوم. هرمز افزایش جزئی. عراق ۲۵۰ هزار بشکه از ترکیه. نفت ۱۰۰-۱۱۲. ۲۰۰+ متخصص اوکراینی. لیو: آمریکا 'کم‌موشک.'

metrics.label: Day
metrics.desc: 'OBJECTIVES MET' — Johnson. But Pentagon $200B+. IAEA: new Isfahan underground. 7,800+ targets. 120+ vessels. GBU-57 on Hormuz. Lieu: 'short of missiles.'

metrics.label: Cumul. missiles
metrics.desc: D20 est. 25: US bunker busters degrading Hormuz coastal sites. Continued Gulf + Israel harassment. Rate declining from D19 spike (40). 5,000-lb GBU-57 on launch sites.

metrics.label: Cumul. drones
metrics.desc: D20 est. 50: Slightly lower. 200+ Ukrainian anti-drone experts now deployed. Baghdad embassy attacks continue. Drone harassment pattern sustained.

metrics.label: Brent crude
metrics.desc: Opened $103.71, range $100-112. Down from $107.38 close on Johnson 'objectives met.' EIA: >$95 next 2mo. Iraq 250K bbl/day via Ceyhan. Volatile.

metrics.label: Iran dead (Hengaw)
metrics.desc: Hengaw 5th report (D18): 4,789 military + 511 civilians (120 minors, 160 women). HRANA: 3,114. Health Ministry: 1,444 + 18,551 injured. Awaiting 6th report.

metrics.desc: Updated from 880. IDF ground ops south of Litani expanding. 3+ more weeks expected. ~1M displaced. Khiam major battle underway.

metrics.label: Israel dead
metrics.desc: 3,727+ wounded. 30-year-old foreign worker killed by cluster bomb shrapnel at Moshav Adanim (D19). Multi-warhead + cluster continues.

metrics.label: Nuclear risk
metrics.desc: NEW: IAEA reveals underground Isfahan enrichment facility. 440kg at 60% = enough for 9 weapons. IAEA locked out of ALL 4 enrichment sites. Bushehr projectile. Grossi: 'many questions.'

metrics_fa.desc: جانسون: اهداف محقق. پنتاگون ۲۰۰+. اصفهان زیرزمینی. ۷,۸۰۰+ هدف. لیو: کم‌موشک.

metrics_fa.label: موشک
metrics_fa.desc: D20: ۲۵. بمب‌های سنگر‌شکن هرمز. تخریب پایگاه‌های ساحلی.

metrics_fa.label: پهپاد

metrics_fa.label: نفت
metrics_fa.desc: باز ۱۰۳.۷۱، محدوده ۱۰۰-۱۱۲. جانسون = کاهش. عراق ۲۵۰ هزار بشکه ترکیه.

metrics_fa.label: لبنان
metrics_fa.desc: عملیات زمینی خیام. ۳+ هفته. ۱ میلیون آواره.

metrics_fa.label: خطر هسته‌ای
metrics_fa.desc: جدید: اصفهان زیرزمینی. ۴۴۰ کیلو ۶۰٪. IAEA بسته. بوشهر. گروسی: سؤالات.

sitrep: JOHNSON: 'OBJECTIVES MET' — House Speaker declared objectives targeting missile capabilities and naval forces 'been met,' war 'virtually accomplished.' Pentagon simultaneously requested $200B+ supplemental funding. Dem Vice Chair Lieu: US 'running short of missiles.' Johnson hinting at reconciliation bill for war funding. Sharp disconnect between political messaging ('nearly done') and military reality (requesting largest supplemental since WWII).

IAEA: NEW UNDERGROUND ISFAHAN FACILITY — IAEA Director General Grossi revealed Iran has NEW underground enrichment facility at Isfahan. Inspectors unable to visit since June 2025 strikes. Iran stored most highly enriched uranium (440kg at 60%) in underground tunnel complex — enough for 9 nuclear weapons if enriched to 90%. IAEA has NO ACCESS to any of Iran's 4 declared enrichment sites. Nuclear risk upgraded to CRITICAL.

HORMUZ TRAFFIC INCREASING: Vessel transits nearly doubled in recent days. Ships rerouting through Iranian territorial waters — 'permission-based transits to friendly countries' (Lloyd's). 11 China-linked vessels since Mar 1. Shadow fleet = half of all transits. Treasury Sec Bessent: US 'letting' Iranian tankers through. Iraq resumed 250K bbl/day via Turkey's Ceyhan port, bypassing Gulf.

BUNKER BUSTERS ON HORMUZ: CENTCOM confirmed 5,000-lb GBU-57 deep penetrator munitions on hardened Iranian missile sites along Hormuz coastline. CENTCOM cumulative: 7,800+ targets struck, 120+ vessels destroyed (up from 90+ on D16). DNI Gabbard: Iran's conventional military 'largely destroyed' but regime 'intact.'

OIL VOLATILE: Brent opened $103.71 (down from $107.38 close), trading range $100-112. Markets digesting Johnson 'objectives met' vs continued escalation. WTI $96.40. EIA forecast: Brent >$95 next 2 months, <$80 by Q3 if war ends. Iraq Ceyhan exports = first bypass of Hormuz blockade.

200+ UKRAINIAN ANTI-DRONE EXPERTS: Zelenskyy confirmed deployment to several ME countries to help defend against Iranian-designed drones. Significant — Ukraine has most practical experience defeating Iranian Shahed drones from Russia war.

MACRON MORATORIUM + DIPLOMATIC: French President called for 'moratorium on strikes targeting civilian infrastructure, particularly energy and water supply facilities.' E3 military backing from D19 continues. 12 FM joint statement in force. Saudi 'right to military action' unchanged. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause status unclear.

LEBANON: 886+ killed (updated from 880). IDF ground ops expanding south of Litani. Major battle underway at Khiam. 2 additional divisions joining 3 already operating. ~1M displaced (19% population). IDF expects 3+ more weeks. Trump admin backs operation but asked Israel to spare Beirut airport.

HENGAW/CASUALTIES: 5,300+ killed in Iran (5th report, D18). HRANA: 3,114. Health Ministry: 1,444 + 18,551 injured. 178 cities across 25 provinces. US: 13 KIA. Israel: 17+ killed, 3,727+ wounded. Gulf: 21+ killed. Awaiting Hengaw 6th report.
sitrep_fa: جانسون: اهداف محقق. جنگ تقریباً تمام. پنتاگون ۲۰۰+ میلیارد. لیو: کم‌موشک. شکاف سیاسی-نظامی.
IAEA: اصفهان زیرزمینی جدید. ۴۴۰ کیلو ۶۰٪ = ۹ سلاح. IAEA بسته از ۴ سایت. خطر بحرانی.
هرمز افزایش: دو برابر. عبور از آب‌های ایران. ۱۱ کشتی چینی. ناوگان سایه. عراق ۲۵۰ هزار بشکه از ترکیه.
سنگرشکن هرمز: GBU-57 بر سایت‌های موشکی. ۷,۸۰۰+ هدف. ۱۲۰+ کشتی. گابارد: تخریب ولی سالم.
نفت: ۱۰۳.۷۱ باز، ۱۰۰-۱۱۲ محدوده. WTI ۹۶.۴۰. عراق = اولین دور‌زدن هرمز.
۲۰۰+ اوکراینی: متخصص ضد پهپاد. تجربه شاهد.
ماکرون: مهلت زیرساخت غیرنظامی. E3 + ۱۲ وزیر + عربستان ادامه. کتائب نامعلوم.
لبنان: ۸۸۶+ کشته. خیام نبرد بزرگ. ۲ لشکر اضافه. ۳+ هفته.
تلفات: ۵,۳۰۰+ هنگاو. آمریکا ۱۳. اسرائیل ۱۷+. خلیج ۲۱+. انتظار گزارش ۶.

dailySeries.sourceLabel: D1-D10: JPost. D11: UAE MoD. D12-D20: fragment est. D20: US bunker busters degrading Hormuz coastal sites. CENTCOM 7,800+ targets, 120+ vessels. 200+ Ukrainian anti-drone experts deployed. Continued Gulf + Israel harassment but rate declining from D19 spike.

oil.note: Full daily series. CNBC/Investing.com confirmed where noted. D20: Brent opened $103.71 (Investing.com), volatile range $100-112. Markets reacting to Johnson 'objectives met' + Iraq Ceyhan bypass + continued Hormuz uncertainty. WTI $96.40. EIA forecast: >$95 next 2mo, <$80 Q3 if war ends. Iraq resumed 250K bbl/day via Turkey Ceyhan.

latestTargetBreakdown.note: Mar 19 (D20) estimate. Continued Gulf + Israel harassment. US bunker busters on Hormuz sites. Baghdad embassy attacks resume. Volume lower than D19 spike. 200+ Ukrainian anti-drone experts now deployed across ME.

dailyRows.primary: All-theater: UAE (Al Dhafra, Dubai airport, Palm Jumeirah), Israel (Tel Aviv, Haifa), Saudi (Ras Tanura), Qatar (Al Udeid), Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan
dailyRows.capability: Operation Roaring Lion / True Promise IV launched within hours. 480 ballistic missiles + 720 drones on D1. Fastest Iranian response ever — suggests pre-positioned C2.
dailyRows.cost: Khamenei killed. IRIS Dena sunk by US submarine off Sri Lanka. Brent $72 (+$7). Hormuz shipping halted immediately — 150 ships stalled.
dailyRows.assessment: Overwhelming opening salvo. Iran distributing fire across 13 countries to overwhelm defenses.

dailyRows.primary: Peak launch day. UAE heaviest target. Israel: 124 injured from 10-warhead ballistic missile at Tel Aviv.
dailyRows.capability: 520 missiles + 850 drones — highest single-day volume. Iran expending stockpile rapidly.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $79.45 (CNBC). Iran state media confirms Khamenei family killed. Assembly of Experts emergency session. Jebel Ali Port fire, AWS data center hit.
dailyRows.assessment: Peak fury. Iran burning through inventory at unsustainable rate.

dailyRows.primary: Kuwait (6 US KIA at Shuaiba Port operations center), Bahrain, Saudi (US Embassy Riyadh drones), Israel (Hezbollah joins)
dailyRows.capability: 400+530. Kuwaiti F/A-18 friendly-fire shoots down 3 US F-15Es (all 6 crew survive). Hezbollah opens second front.
dailyRows.cost: 6 US KIA — first American combat deaths. Brent ~$83. Qatar arrests 10 IRGC cell operatives.
dailyRows.assessment: War expands. US casualties mount. Hezbollah + Iraqi militias = multi-front.

dailyRows.primary: Nuclear sites: Natanz entrance destroyed, Isfahan, Fordow access roads hit, Arak targeted
dailyRows.capability: 350+480. Declining from peak but still massive. Coalition strikes nuclear infrastructure.
dailyRows.cost: IAEA confirms Natanz inaccessible. Enrichment stockpile unverified 8+ months. Humanitarian crisis emerging.
dailyRows.assessment: Nuclear dimension activated. Escalation risk from enrichment uncertainty.

dailyRows.primary: Hezbollah long-range missile at Tel Aviv. Israel 250+ strikes on Lebanon. IRIS Dena confirmed sunk.
dailyRows.capability: 250+350. Clear decline. Senate rejects war powers resolution. CSIS: first 100 hours = $3.7B.
dailyRows.cost: Lebanon front fully active. Brent ~$90. Senate gives Trump political cover.
dailyRows.assessment: Decline accelerating. Political constraints loosening domestically.

dailyRows.primary: Qatar (14 ballistic + 4 drones per MoD), Kuwait, Bahrain, UAE
dailyRows.capability: 150+220. Fars claims >500 missiles, ~2,000 drones cumul. Rate ↓69% missiles, ↓74% drones.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$92. IEA triggers largest coordinated SPR release in history (400M bbl). War cost ~$2B/day.
dailyRows.assessment: Iran's ballistic capability declining structurally. Economic war intensifying.

dailyRows.primary: Continued Gulf + Israel harassment. Iraq: PMF HQs struck across multiple provinces.
dailyRows.capability: 100+160. Rate ↓79% missiles. >60% of Iranian launchers neutralized. 43 naval vessels destroyed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $92.69 (CNBC). VLCC freight rates approaching records. Ruwais refinery shut (922K bbl/day offline).
dailyRows.assessment: Iran losing conventional capability. Asymmetric phase beginning.

dailyRows.primary: Diminished volume across Gulf. Iraq militia attacks intensify. F-35 shoots down Iranian Yak-130 — first F-35 air-to-air kill.
dailyRows.capability: 70+110. Rate ↓85%. Red Crescent: 65 schools, 32 medical facilities damaged.
dailyRows.cost: Brent intraday volatility. IEA Oil Market Report: 'largest supply disruption in history.' 20 Mb/d offline. Iran internet blackout persists.
dailyRows.assessment: Conventional campaign near-spent. Iran shifting to economic leverage.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD cumul: 1,422 UAVs detected (1,342 intercepted). All 8 cruise missiles intercepted.
dailyRows.capability: 50+80. Rate ↓90%. UAE air defenses showing strain but holding.
dailyRows.cost: Brent hits $119.50 — 52-week high (Investing.com). IEA: 'within whisker of $120.' Then crashes on SPR release news. Extreme volatility.
dailyRows.assessment: Oil price spike signals market panic. SPR intervention buys temporary relief.

dailyRows.primary: Mojtaba Khamenei designated new Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts. NATO intercepts 2nd missile over Turkey.
dailyRows.capability: 40+60. Rate ↓92%. Trump claims war 'very complete, pretty much.' Then backtracks.
dailyRows.cost: Brent crashes to $88.43 (CNBC) — post-SPR selloff. EIA settles $94. Turkey deploys F-16s to N. Cyprus. 10,000+ civilian sites damaged in Iran.
dailyRows.assessment: Political transition in Iran. Conventional capability near-exhausted but regime intact.

dailyRows.primary: UAE reports continued intercepts. Gulf state coordination improving. Iraq: 300+ militia attacks cumul since D1.
dailyRows.capability: 27+81 (scaled from UAE MoD). Missile launches at lowest sustained level. Drones maintaining higher volume — cheaper, harder to suppress.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$91. Trump signals drawdown but Pentagon contradicts. Mixed messages on endgame.
dailyRows.assessment: Drone-missile divergence: missiles near-depleted but drone harassment continues at meaningful level.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD: 13 missiles (6 ballistic + 7 cruise) + 39 drones intercepted (official). Bahrain airport drones + fuel tanks fire. Ship hit in Hormuz.
dailyRows.capability: UAE cumul: 268 ballistic + 15 cruise + 1,514 UAVs. Fortune: Brent $90.96 AM. Drone attacks on airports emerging as pattern.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $91.98 close (CNBC). UKMTO: 16+ ships attacked cumul. Container ship fire in Hormuz.
dailyRows.assessment: Low-volume but high-disruption attacks on civilian infrastructure.

dailyRows.primary: Bahrain airport hit. Kuwait airport targeted. Dubai explosions. Abu Dhabi old airport fire. Container ship attacked near Jebel Ali.
dailyRows.capability: 8+40. KC-135 Stratotanker crashes western Iraq — 6 US KIA (total now 13). 4th US aircraft lost. Iran militias claim credit.
dailyRows.cost: Brent first >$100 close: $100.46 (CNBC). Fortune AM: $99.84. French CWO Frion killed near Erbil — first non-US allied death.
dailyRows.assessment: US losses mounting. Oil breaking $100 sustainably. French casualty internationalizes war.

dailyRows.primary: New Supreme Leader Khamenei first statement (written only — no video). Vows Hormuz stays closed. 3 more ships struck. Kuwait power lines hit by debris.
dailyRows.capability: 10+30. CENTCOM: 6,000+ US targets struck. 90+ Iranian vessels destroyed. Ballistic ↓86% from D1. UNSC Res 2817 condemns Iran 13-0-2.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $99.32 (CNBC). Khamenei statement fuels speculation on injuries. $10M bounty on Khamenei. State Dept: 'likely disfigured.'
dailyRows.assessment: Khamenei's absence and written-only statement suggests serious injuries. IRGC operating autonomously.

dailyRows.primary: UAE 9 ballistic + 33 drones intercepted (AJ). Qatar 4 ballistic + drones. Saudi 51 drones — LARGEST single-day barrage targeting kingdom. Kuwait airport drones. Jordan: 79/85 intercepted over week 2.
dailyRows.capability: 20+70. DRONE VOLUME TICKED UP — Saudi's 51-drone barrage a significant escalation. Kharg Island: 90+ military targets struck by CENTCOM (sparing oil). White House: ballistic ↓90%, drones ↓95%, 65+ vessels sunk.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $103.14 Fri close (CNBC). Fujairah oil hub fire from drone debris. IRGC declares UAE bases 'legitimate targets.' Trump 'not ready for deal.' May hit Kharg 'a few more times just for fun.'
dailyRows.assessment: Drone escalation despite missile depletion. Saudi barrage = Iran still has UAV stockpile. Kharg strike shows coalition restraint on oil — but for how long?

dailyRows.primary: Heaviest single-night bombardment since D1: Isfahan, Shiraz (20+ explosions), Tehran, Dezful, Khomein, Hamedan, Jask port. 6+ provinces. 10+ hypersonic missiles at Israel.
dailyRows.capability: 25+60. IRGC fires 10+ HYPERSONIC missiles at Israel — capability escalation. Israel critically low on ballistic interceptors (Semafor). IDF: 7,600+ strikes in Iran, 1,100+ in Lebanon cumul.
dailyRows.cost: 15+ killed Isfahan. Shiraz residential areas hit. 10,000+ homes destroyed (Tehran governor). 56 cultural sites damaged. Pope calls ceasefire. Pahlavi outlines transition. Houthis threaten Red Sea resumption.
dailyRows.assessment: Hypersonic escalation + interceptor crisis = war's most dangerous moment since D1. Houthi threat = potential second maritime chokepoint.

dailyRows.primary: Israel new Tehran strikes (smoke over capital). Dubai airport drone fire (flights suspended→limited). Abu Dhabi missile kill. Fujairah drone fire. Saudi 37 drones intercepted (AJ). Baghdad airport rockets. Israel: 245 attack waves total.
dailyRows.capability: DRONE VOLUME SURGED — Saudi 37 drones alone is highest single-day count from kingdom. IRGC claims most weapons cache intact and hasn't used post-2025 missiles yet. If true, Iran's offensive depth is much greater than ↓90% suggests. Israel planning 3+ more weeks of strikes.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106+. Gulf exports ↓61% (Reuters/Kpler). US wounded revised to ~200. Hormuz coalition failing — Australia, Japan, Germany all declined. G5 'gravely concerned' re Lebanon. Trump threatens NATO umbrella + Xi summit.
dailyRows.assessment: IRGC 'arsenal intact' claim is the most significant D17 development. If true, Iran has been deliberately rationing — using old stock while preserving modern missiles. This reframes the entire attrition narrative. War may have much longer tail than assumed.

dailyRows.primary: DECAPITATION: Larijani + Soleimani confirmed killed. UAE full airspace closure. Qatar 13/14 ballistic intercepted. Saudi 12+ drones. Baghdad Al-Rasheed Hotel + embassy targeted. Abu Dhabi 1 killed. Tanker struck off Fujairah. Israel ground invasion of Lebanon.
dailyRows.capability: Decapitation accelerating but Qatar 13/14 ballistic missiles = Iran still has meaningful ballistic capability. IRGC 'cache intact' claim from D16 gaining credibility. Israel ground ops in Lebanon = second full front.
dailyRows.cost: Joe Kent (NCTC director) resigned — 'Iran not a threat.' Trump: don't need NATO. Delayed China trip 1 month. France: 'never' Hormuz during war. Amnesty: 170+ schoolgirls killed in US strike.
dailyRows.assessment: Crosscurrents: Military decapitation vs economic leverage. Israel destroying command structure but Iran's remaining capability + Hormuz control = strategic stalemate. First tanker transit could signal beginning of negotiated passage framework.

dailyRows.primary: ENERGY + NUCLEAR WAR: Israel struck South Pars (AM). Iran hit Ras Laffan LNG TWICE (PM). Bushehr NPP 'hostile projectile' (IAEA: no reactor damage, Rosatom suspended construction). 5th senior kill (Basij head + Khatib). Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Multi-warhead at Israel (2 killed). Saudi 4 ballistic at Riyadh DURING FM meeting + drone at gas facility.
dailyRows.capability: ENERGY WAR FULLY MUTUAL + NUCLEAR DIMENSION. Ras Laffan x2, South Pars, Bushehr NPP all hit in single day. Iran named specific Gulf targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Multi-warhead Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr. Israel striking northern Iran. D19 missile count REVISED UP from 35→40 on 2nd Ras Laffan confirmation.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $107.38 close (CNBC), spiked $111+ after-hours. Gas $3.84 (+29%). Fed held rates. Pentagon $200B+. Qatar expelled attaches. Saudi: 'right to military action.' 12 FM joint statement. E3 backing military defense. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Lebanon 880+. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause. IMO emergency meeting.
dailyRows.assessment: INFLECTION: Energy + nuclear. Bushehr projectile = nuclear-adjacent escalation. Ras Laffan x2 = Qatar's LNG industry threatened. E3 military backing + 12 FM statement + Saudi warning = diplomatic momentum toward intervention OR escalation. Kataib Hezbollah pause offer = first crack in Iran proxy unity. IMO corridor = international shipping institutions mobilizing. Every constraint dissolving simultaneously.

dailyRows.primary: 'OBJECTIVES MET' + NUCLEAR ESCALATION: Johnson declares war 'virtually accomplished.' Pentagon requests $200B+. IAEA reveals NEW underground Isfahan enrichment facility (440kg at 60% = 9 weapons). US 5,000-lb bunker busters on Hormuz missile sites. Hormuz traffic slightly increasing. Iraq 250K bbl/day via Ceyhan. 200+ Ukrainian anti-drone experts deployed.
dailyRows.capability: D20 missile/drone rate declining from D19 spike as US bunker busters degrade Hormuz coastal launch sites. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets, 120+ vessels destroyed. But Isfahan underground facility = nuclear capability MORE advanced than believed. IAEA locked out of ALL 4 enrichment sites. Lieu: US 'running short of missiles.'
dailyRows.cost: Brent volatile: opened $103.71, range $100-112. Johnson 'objectives met' = political signal for war wind-down. But $200B+ supplemental + Lieu warning = military reality contradicts. Lebanon: 886+ killed. Khiam battle. 200+ Ukrainian experts = international involvement widening.
dailyRows.assessment: DIVERGENCE DAY: Political messaging ('nearly done') vs military reality ($200B+, 'short of missiles'). Isfahan underground = nuclear crisis deepening. Hormuz traffic uptick = possible negotiated passage framework emerging. Iraq Ceyhan bypass = first economic adaptation. War entering phase where political endgame diverges from military reality.

timeline.title: Week 3 (Mar 16–22)
timeline.body: 'OBJECTIVES MET' vs $200B+ SUPPLEMENTAL — Johnson declares war virtually done while Pentagon requests largest supplemental since WWII. IAEA reveals NEW underground Isfahan enrichment facility. 440kg enriched uranium at 60%. Nuclear risk CRITICAL. Hormuz traffic slightly increasing — permission-based. Iraq bypassing Hormuz via Ceyhan. 200+ Ukrainian experts deployed. Brent $100-112. Next 48h: does Hormuz passage framework formalize? Does Johnson's rhetoric lead to actual drawdown?

timeline.title: Week 4–5 (Mar 23–Apr 5)
timeline.body: If Johnson's 'objectives met' leads to actual drawdown: oil drops to $90-95 range, Hormuz gradually reopens with escorts, diplomatic track accelerates. If disconnect continues: $200B+ signals sustained ops, Isfahan underground becomes central crisis, Hormuz permission-based transit evolves into framework. Lebanon ground ops culminating around Litani. US missile resupply becomes critical issue per Lieu warning.

timeline.title: Month 2 (Apr–May)
timeline.body: Isfahan enrichment facility becomes defining issue. IAEA locked out = verification crisis. 440kg at 60% = nuclear breakout risk during fog of war. Pentagon $200B+ = planning for sustained ops regardless of Johnson rhetoric. Hormuz partial reopening likely through permission-based framework. Iraq Ceyhan bypass could expand. Lebanon resolution possible if Khiam battle succeeds.

timeline.title: Month 3+ (May onward)
timeline.body: Nuclear verification crisis at Isfahan defines long-term trajectory. If IAEA access restored: negotiated framework possible. If not: permanent crisis. Hormuz either normalizes through framework or remains permission-based (China-friendly). Oil market adapts through bypass routes. Regional economy in restructuring, not recovery.

timeline.title: Endgame variables
timeline.body: Isfahan underground enrichment (nuclear breakout?). Johnson rhetoric vs Pentagon reality. US missile resupply timeline. Hormuz permission-based framework. Iraq Ceyhan bypass expansion. Saudi military entry decision. Lieu 'short of missiles' — war sustainability. 200+ Ukrainian experts effectiveness. Mojtaba Khamenei appearance. Reconciliation bill politics.

timeline_fa.title: هفته ۳ (۱۶–۲۲ مارس)
timeline_fa.body: جانسون 'اهداف محقق' در برابر ۲۰۰+ میلیارد. اصفهان زیرزمینی. ۴۴۰ کیلو. هرمز افزایش. عراق از ترکیه. ۲۰۰+ اوکراینی. ۴۸ ساعت: هرمز رسمی؟ خروج واقعی؟

timeline_fa.title: هفته ۴–۵
timeline_fa.body: اگر خروج واقعی: نفت ۹۰-۹۵. هرمز بازگشایی تدریجی. اگر ادامه: اصفهان بحران مرکزی. موشک آمریکا کم. لبنان لیطانی.

timeline_fa.title: ماه ۲
timeline_fa.body: اصفهان تعیین‌کننده. IAEA بسته = بحران تأیید. ۴۴۰ کیلو = شکست هسته‌ای. پنتاگون ۲۰۰+. هرمز عادی‌سازی جزئی. عراق.

timeline_fa.title: ماه ۳+
timeline_fa.body: اصفهان: IAEA دسترسی = چارچوب. نه = بحران دائمی. هرمز = عادی‌سازی یا مجوزی. بازسازی نه بهبود.

timeline_fa.title: متغیرهای پایانی
timeline_fa.body: اصفهان (شکست؟). جانسون در برابر واقعیت. موشک آمریکا. هرمز چارچوب. عراق. عربستان. لیو 'کم‌موشک'. اوکراینی. مجتبی. لایحه.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Escalation spiral / total war
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED slightly from 42%. Johnson 'objectives met' + Hormuz traffic uptick = signals of potential de-escalation. But Isfahan underground enrichment facility = nuclear crisis DEEPENING. IAEA locked out of all 4 sites. 440kg at 60% enrichment. E3 + Saudi + 12 FM statements still in force. Nuclear breakout risk during fog of war could re-escalate rapidly. Spiral risk now driven by NUCLEAR dimension more than conventional.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Declared victory + exit
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED from 15%. Johnson 'objectives met' = strongest US political signal for wind-down yet. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets, 120+ vessels = impressive stats for victory narrative. But $200B+ supplemental + Lieu 'short of missiles' undercuts narrative. Lebanon resolution could provide clean exit opportunity. Hormuz permission-based framework = face-saving for both sides.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Protracted attrition
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED from 22%. Hormuz traffic uptick + Iraq Ceyhan bypass = economic adaptation reducing attrition pressure. Johnson rhetoric pushes toward resolution. But Isfahan nuclear crisis + $200B+ signals contradictory. If declared victory stalls, reverts to grinding attrition. Ukraine anti-drone experts deployment = improving defense but extending capacity for sustained conflict.

scenarioProbabilities.name: International intervention / ceasefire
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED from 8%. Macron moratorium on civilian infrastructure. E3 military backing. 12 FM statement. Lebanon direct talks. IMO corridor. Hormuz permission-based framework = emerging institutions for resolution. Isfahan nuclear dimension could trigger Russia diplomatic pressure (Rosatom suspended). More actors and mechanisms pushing toward intervention than at any point.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Regime fracture
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED from 8%. DNI Gabbard: regime 'intact.' IRGC operating autonomously. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause = proxy independence, not fracture. Isfahan underground facility = regime planning for post-war. Mojtaba Khamenei still absent but institutions functioning. Military relocating to civilian spaces = adaptation not collapse.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Negotiated deal
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED slightly. Isfahan underground enrichment makes nuclear deal MORE complex, not less. Hormuz permission-based transit = backdoor de-escalation possible. Araghchi offered to dilute enriched material (Mar 15). But IAEA locked out = no verification mechanism. Political conditions don't support formal negotiations yet.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مارپیچ تشدید / جنگ تمام‌عیار
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش جزئی. جانسون 'محقق' + هرمز. اما اصفهان زیرزمینی = هسته‌ای عمیق‌تر. IAEA بسته. ۴۴۰ کیلو. خطر شکست هسته‌ای.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: اعلام پیروزی + خروج
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش از ۱۵٪. جانسون 'محقق' = قوی‌ترین سیگنال. ۷,۸۰۰+ هدف. اما ۲۰۰+ میلیارد + لیو. لبنان = فرصت خروج.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: فرسایشی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش. هرمز افزایش + عراق = سازگاری اقتصادی. اما اصفهان + ۲۰۰+ میلیارد.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مداخله بین‌المللی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش. ماکرون + E3 + ۱۲ وزیر + IMO + هرمز چارچوب. اصفهان = فشار روسیه.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: فروپاشی رژیم
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش. رژیم سالم. سپاه مستقل. اصفهان = برنامه‌ریزی پس‌جنگ.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مذاکره
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش جزئی. اصفهان = پیچیدگی بیشتر. هرمز = غیررسمی ممکن. اما IAEA بسته.

theoryEvaluation.title: Political-military divergence — the defining D20 dynamic
theoryEvaluation.body: D20's central tension: Johnson declares war 'virtually accomplished' while Pentagon requests $200B+ supplemental. Lieu says US 'running short of missiles.' These cannot both be true. Either: (a) objectives ARE met and $200B+ is for cleanup/reconstruction/deterrence; (b) objectives are NOT met and Johnson is setting up political exit narrative while military continues; or (c) objectives are met against Iran's CONVENTIONAL capability but nuclear/Hormuz/proxy dimensions remain unresolved. Option (c) most likely — 7,800+ targets and 120+ vessels is genuinely impressive destruction, but Isfahan underground, Hormuz, and proxy networks are fundamentally different problems.

theoryEvaluation.title: Nuclear crisis deepening — Isfahan underground
theoryEvaluation.body: IAEA revealing a NEW underground enrichment facility at Isfahan is D20's most significant strategic development. 440kg at 60% enrichment could produce 9 weapons if enriched to 90%. IAEA has NO ACCESS to any of Iran's 4 declared enrichment sites. Grossi: 'many questions.' This means: (1) The war has NOT eliminated Iran's nuclear capability — it may have accelerated it by removing verification; (2) Any ceasefire must address Isfahan or the nuclear crisis worsens; (3) Iran's underground infrastructure survived — bunker busters have limits; (4) Nuclear breakout risk is higher during fog of war than peacetime.

theoryEvaluation.title: Hormuz emerging framework — permission-based transit
theoryEvaluation.body: Hormuz traffic nearly doubling + ships using Iranian territorial waters + Bessent saying US 'letting' Iranian tankers through = an informal framework emerging. Iraq's 250K bbl/day via Ceyhan = first bypass route. This is significant because: (1) Both sides benefit from partial oil flow; (2) Permission-based = Iran retains control while allowing economic pressure relief; (3) China-linked vessels leading = geopolitical alignment in transit rights; (4) If formalized, this becomes the skeleton of a ceasefire mechanism.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: شکاف سیاسی-نظامی — پویایی D20
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: جانسون 'محقق' در برابر ۲۰۰+ میلیارد. لیو: کم‌موشک. هر دو نمی‌تواند درست باشد. محتمل‌ترین: اهداف متعارف محقق اما هسته‌ای/هرمز/نیابتی حل نشده.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: بحران هسته‌ای — اصفهان زیرزمینی
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: IAEA: تأسیسات زیرزمینی جدید. ۴۴۰ کیلو ۶۰٪ = ۹ سلاح. IAEA بسته. جنگ حذف نکرد — تأیید حذف کرد. آتش‌بس بدون اصفهان = بحران بدتر.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: هرمز — چارچوب مجوزی نوظهور
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ترافیک دو برابر + آب‌های ایران + بسنت = چارچوب غیررسمی. عراق ۲۵۰ هزار = اولین دور‌زدن. چین پیشرو. اگر رسمی شود = اسکلت آتش‌بس.

endstate.title: Most likely (38%)
endstate.body: Escalation spiral driven by NUCLEAR dimension. Isfahan underground enrichment facility + IAEA locked out = verification crisis that conventional military success cannot resolve. Johnson 'objectives met' rhetoric could produce premature exit leaving nuclear problem WORSE than pre-war. E3/Saudi/12 FM pressure continues. If nuclear breakout detected: immediate re-escalation. If not: slow-burn crisis. The war's central paradox: military success against conventional targets may have accelerated the nuclear timeline by removing inspectors.

endstate.title: Second (25%)
endstate.body: Declared victory + exit. Johnson + CENTCOM stats (7,800+ targets, 120+ vessels) = strong narrative. Hormuz permission-based framework = face-saving for both sides. Lebanon resolution via Litani operation = clean win. $200B+ funds transition + deterrence. But Isfahan nuclear unresolved = ticking clock. This scenario is POLITICALLY likely but STRATEGICALLY incomplete.

endstate.title: Emerging (10%)
endstate.body: International intervention/ceasefire. Macron moratorium + E3 + 12 FM + IMO + Hormuz framework = more institutional momentum than any previous day. Isfahan nuclear could trigger Russia (Rosatom suspended). Lebanon direct talks. If multiple tracks converge: first comprehensive ceasefire framework possible within 2 weeks. Hormuz permission-based transit as pilot mechanism.

endstate.title: Wild card (5%)
endstate.body: Nuclear breakout at Isfahan. 440kg at 60% + underground + IAEA locked out = capability exists. War chaos provides cover. International response would be unprecedented. Alternatively: US missile supply crisis (per Lieu) forces unplanned drawdown before objectives actually achieved.

endstate_fa.title: محتمل‌ترین (۳۸٪)
endstate_fa.body: مارپیچ هسته‌ای. اصفهان + IAEA بسته = بحران تأیید. جانسون 'محقق' = خروج زودرس؟ هسته‌ای بدتر از قبل جنگ. تناقض: موفقیت نظامی = تسریع هسته‌ای.

endstate_fa.title: دوم (۲۵٪)
endstate_fa.body: اعلام پیروزی. جانسون + ۷,۸۰۰+ = روایت قوی. هرمز مجوزی. لبنان. اما اصفهان حل‌نشده = ساعت.

endstate_fa.title: نوظهور (۱۰٪)
endstate_fa.body: مداخله. ماکرون + E3 + ۱۲ وزیر + IMO + هرمز. لبنان مذاکره. ۲ هفته؟

endstate_fa.title: غیرمنتظره (۵٪)
endstate_fa.body: شکست هسته‌ای اصفهان. ۴۴۰ کیلو + زیرزمینی. یا بحران موشک آمریکا = خروج اجباری.

shippingRoutes.detail: Unchanged. Regional aviation collapsed. Iran named UAE targets. Turkish Airlines suspended. Abu Dhabi gas offline. This route remains permanently dead for duration of conflict and likely months beyond.
shippingRoutes.eta: N/A — route permanently disrupted for duration of conflict

shippingRoutes.detail: Closed per on-ground intel. NATO intercepted missiles over Turkey. Iraq resumed 250K bbl/day via Ceyhan — suggests Turkey–Iraq corridor functional but Turkey–Iran border remains shut for commercial traffic. Slight improvement in regional logistics via Iraq but not direct Iran–Turkey route.
shippingRoutes.eta: Not viable until conflict ends + diplomatic normalization

shippingRoutes.detail: Still most viable but declining. Israel continues striking northern Iran. 178 cities across 25 provinces. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets. Bushehr strikes confirmed geographic expansion. Johnson 'objectives met' could reduce strike tempo IF rhetoric becomes reality. Armenia route viability depends on whether northern Iran strikes de-escalate.
Eastern borders not directly in combat zone but infrastructure minimal. No change from previous assessment.
shippingRoutes.eta: Months to establish if even possible

shippingRoutes_fa.detail: بسته. عراق از ترکیه بشکه نفت = کریدور عراق-ترکیه فعال اما ایران-ترکیه نه.
هنوز بهترین اما کاهشی. حملات شمال ایران ادامه. جانسون 'محقق' = شاید کاهش حملات.

publishingStatus: Paper supply: CRITICAL. No change. Hormuz closed + rial collapsed. South Pars + Ras Laffan damage persists. Iraq Ceyhan bypass = oil only, not paper.
Internet blackout: 3+ weeks. No change in connectivity. Total communications isolation continues.
Power outages: Sustained and WORSENING. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets across country. 178 cities, 25 provinces. Bushehr nuclear area damaged.
Isfahan + Shiraz: Both under sustained bombardment. IAEA reveals Isfahan underground facility — suggests parts of Isfahan complex survived. Cultural infrastructure at extreme risk.
56+ cultural sites damaged. 5,300+ dead (Hengaw). 25 provinces struck. Publishing workforce in danger zones.
New title production: Effectively halted. Only pre-war warehouse stock. Johnson 'objectives met' could reduce strike tempo IF realized — but publishing recovery requires months after any cessation.

Assessment: Iranian publishing industry in existential crisis. Isfahan underground facility survival suggests some infrastructure resilience but above-ground is devastated. Recovery timeline: years minimum. No near-term improvement possible.
publishingStatus_fa: کاغذ: بحرانی. بدون تغییر. عراق فقط نفت نه کاغذ.
قطع برق: بدتر. ۷,۸۰۰+ هدف. ۱۷۸ شهر ۲۵ استان.
اصفهان + شیراز: بمباران ادامه. زیرزمینی باقی اما روی‌زمین ویران.
تولید متوقف. جانسون = شاید کاهش حملات اما بازسازی ماه‌ها.
impactIranfarhang: PRIMARY ROUTE DEAD: Tehran→Dubai→Atlanta completely non-functional. No change. Regional aviation collapsed.

BEST ALTERNATIVE: Armenia (Agarak/Norduz) border — declining but still most viable. Johnson 'objectives met' could reduce northern Iran strikes IF rhetoric becomes reality. Watch next 48-72h for actual tempo change.

SUPPLY SOURCE DETERIORATING: CENTCOM 7,800+ targets, 25 provinces struck. Military in civilian spaces. South Pars + Bushehr damage persists. Isfahan underground survival = some infrastructure but publishing infrastructure above-ground.

OFAC STATUS: Informational materials exemption (31 CFR §560.210(c)) remains valid. E3 military involvement + Macron moratorium = European compliance environment mixed — moratorium could ease, military involvement could tighten.
FINANCIAL: Rial in freefall. Brent $100-112 volatile. Johnson rhetoric could stabilize markets slightly. Iraq Ceyhan bypass = small positive for regional financial flows.

WINDOW: Johnson 'objectives met' = possible inflection. If strikes actually reduce, Armenia window could stabilize. If rhetoric only, continued deterioration. Next 48-72h critical for assessing whether political signals translate to operational changes.
impactIranfarhang_fa: ارمنستان: کاهشی اما بهترین. جانسون = شاید کاهش حملات. ۴۸-۷۲ ساعت.
منبع بدتر: ۷,۸۰۰+ هدف. ۲۵ استان. زیرزمینی باقی اما روی‌زمین.
OFAC: معتبر. ماکرون = تسهیل؟ E3 = سخت‌تر؟
مالی: ریال. نفت ۱۰۰-۱۱۲. جانسون = ثبات جزئی؟
پنجره: جانسون = نقطه عطف؟ ۴۸-۷۲ ساعت حیاتی.
prepIranfarhang: Activate Armenia route exploration: Contact Yerevan-based logistics contacts. Assess Agarak/Norduz border crossing capacity for book freight.
Identify Tehran warehouse partners willing/able to load and dispatch to Armenian border despite domestic conditions (no internet, active strikes, military in civilian spaces).
Pre-negotiate Yerevan→port (Poti, Georgia or Batumi)→sea freight→US routing and costs.
Accelerate procurement of any accessible pre-war inventory — prioritize high-demand university titles.
Brief university library clients on supply disruption timeline and potential delays. Set expectations for 3-6 month procurement window.
Monitor KEMCO payment channel capacity — confirm French bank compliance posture, especially re E3 military involvement and Macron moratorium (contradictory signals).
Prepare contingency for total supply interruption lasting 6+ months.
Monitor Isfahan nuclear situation — IAEA locked out, 440kg enriched uranium status unknown. Any nuclear incident triggers new global sanctions.
NEW: Watch Johnson 'objectives met' for actual operational impact. If strikes reduce in 48-72h, Armenia window stabilizes.
prepIranfarhang_fa: بررسی مسیر ارمنستان: تماس با شرکای ایروان.
نظارت اصفهان — IAEA بسته. تحریم جدید؟
signalsIranfarhang: CRITICAL: Isfahan underground enrichment — IAEA locked out, 440kg at 60%, nuclear breakout risk. Any nuclear incident = new global sanctions regime.
CRITICAL: Johnson 'objectives met' → actual strike tempo reduction? Watch next 48-72h for operational changes. If real, Armenia window stabilizes.
CRITICAL: Iran follow-through on named Gulf energy targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn) — if struck, regional logistics completely collapse.
WATCH: Hormuz permission-based framework — if formalized, partial normalization possible. Iraq Ceyhan bypass expanding?
WATCH: E3 military deployment + Macron moratorium (contradictory signals) — which dominates European policy?
WATCH: Saudi military action decision — if Saudi enters war, ALL Middle East logistics shut down.
WATCH: US missile resupply — Lieu 'running short.' If confirmed, forced drawdown regardless of objectives.
WATCH: Ras Laffan damage assessment — Qatar LNG outage duration determines regional trajectory.
signalsIranfarhang_fa: بحرانی: اصفهان — IAEA بسته. ۴۴۰ کیلو. شکست = تحریم جدید.
بحرانی: جانسون 'محقق' = کاهش حملات واقعی؟ ۴۸-۷۲ ساعت.
نظارت: هرمز چارچوب مجوزی. عراق گسترش؟
impactKIP: Iran-UAE corridor: DEAD. No change. Iran named UAE targets. IRGC: 'legitimate targets.' Risk maximum.
UAE asset risk: HIGH. Iran threats to specific UAE targets unchanged. E3 military backing continues. Macron moratorium could reduce strikes on civilian infrastructure IF adopted broadly.

Hormuz: Traffic slightly INCREASING — permission-based. Ships using Iranian waters. 11 China-linked vessels since Mar 1. Shadow fleet = half of transits. Bessent: US 'letting' Iranian tankers through. Iraq 250K bbl/day via Ceyhan = first bypass.
QATAR: Ras Laffan struck TWICE (D19). Attaches expelled. Force majeure ongoing. LNG industry threatened but Qatar not escalating — expelled attaches and joined 12 FM statement but no military action.

Banking: Johnson 'objectives met' + Hormuz traffic uptick = slight easing in compliance pressure. But Isfahan nuclear revelation could trigger NEW compliance requirements. E3 military + Macron moratorium = contradictory European signals.

Physical security: Iran named specific energy targets. Bushehr nuclear dimension. But 200+ Ukrainian anti-drone experts deployed = improving defenses. Operating environment remains extremely dangerous.
impactKIP_fa: دارایی‌ها: بالا. تهدید ادامه. ماکرون = شاید کاهش.
هرمز: افزایش جزئی. مجوزی. چین. عراق ۲۵۰ هزار.
قطر: راس لفان ۲ بار. فورس ماژور. اما اقدام نظامی نه.
بانکداری: جانسون = تسهیل جزئی. اما اصفهان = الزامات جدید؟
امنیت: اهداف نام‌برده. ۲۰۰+ اوکراینی = بهبود دفاع.
prepKIP: Assess all KIP assets in UAE for exposure to military risk and potential asset freeze. Iran threats unchanged.
Establish emergency communication protocols (satellite phone, third-country relay).
Diversify banking away from UAE — consider Oman, Turkey, or other jurisdictions. Monitor Isfahan nuclear compliance implications.
Suspend any new UAE-bound shipments until Hormuz reopens and airport operations normalize.
Prepare legal contingency for potential UAE asset freeze or enhanced sanctions screening.
Identify alternative logistics hubs: Oman (Muscat/Sohar), Turkey (Mersin), Georgia (Poti/Batumi). Iraq Ceyhan route emerging as potential bypass.
Monitor insurance market — Ras Laffan x2 + Bushehr + Isfahan underground = massive premium environment.
Brief all personnel in UAE on physical security. 200+ Ukrainian experts deployed = improving air defense but ground risk remains.
Monitor Isfahan nuclear situation — IAEA locked out. Any nuclear development triggers new global compliance regime.
NEW: Johnson 'objectives met' — if realized, earliest possible window for UAE operations resumption planning (weeks/months, not days).
signalsKIP: CRITICAL: Isfahan underground enrichment — IAEA locked out. 440kg at 60%. Any nuclear development = new global compliance regime.
CRITICAL: Johnson 'objectives met' → actual drawdown? Watch 48-72h. If real, earliest window for UAE planning.
CRITICAL: Saudi Arabia military action decision — if Saudi enters, all Gulf business operations shut down entirely.
CRITICAL: Iran follow-through on named targets — next 24-48h determines if energy war escalates further.
WATCH: Hormuz permission-based framework — if formalized, partial normalization enables some trade. Iraq Ceyhan bypass expanding.
WATCH: US missile resupply — Lieu 'short of missiles.' If confirmed, forced drawdown regardless of objectives.
WATCH: Macron moratorium vs E3 military — which European policy dominates? Contradictory signals.
WATCH: Insurance market — Isfahan nuclear + Ras Laffan x2 + Bushehr = unprecedented premium environment.
WATCH: 200+ Ukrainian anti-drone experts — effectiveness data in coming days will inform Gulf defense posture.
signalsKIP_fa: بحرانی: اصفهان — IAEA بسته. تحریم جدید.
نظارت: بیمه — اصفهان + راس لفان + بوشهر.
